artifact: P172 complete — Stage 1 + Stage 2 dynamic SLAM backend replication (5 sessions, 16 configs)
claim_boundary: 5-session DROID-SLAM evidence (3 Aisle same-day/cross-day/cross-month + 1 Hallway scene-transfer). All 4 replication sessions (P172) are trajectory-neutral with selective semantic frontend masks. Mask selectivity (not scene type, not temporal separation) is the operative condition. Only DROID-SLAM tested; only TorWIC warehouse environment; ORB-SLAM3 not evaluated.
method: 64-frame DROID-SLAM with global BA, semantic frontend masks (fork/forklift labels from bundle frontend_output or batch2 frontend_output), no temporal propagation, no dilation.

evidence_chain_summary.p171_single_session: 12 configs on Jun15 Run1 (64f): 7 neutral, 5 perturbed. Mask selectivity = necessary condition.
evidence_chain_summary.p172_stage1: 2 additional Aisle sessions (Jun15 Run2 same-day, Jun23 Run1 cross-day): both trajectory-neutral.
evidence_chain_summary.p172_stage2: 1 cross-month Aisle (Oct12, +4 months) + 1 Hallway scene-transfer (Oct12 Hallway Full CW): both trajectory-neutral.
evidence_chain_summary.replication_status: CLEAN — all 4 replication sessions (P172) are trajectory-neutral. Selectivity is universal condition, not scene or time dependent.

claim_upgrade.after_p172_stage2: 5 sessions, 11/16 neutral — cross-month + Hallway scene-transfer confirmed
claim_upgrade.strengthened: Trajectory-neutrality extends across (a) temporal separation up to 4 months, and (b) from Aisle to Hallway scene type. Mask selectivity is the invariant condition.
claim_upgrade.remaining: Only DROID-SLAM tested; ORB-SLAM3 not evaluated; only TorWIC warehouse; no full-session-length runs.
